core.intent_parser.purpose: Classify natural-language commands and route them to capabilities.
core.intent_parser.notes: LLM provider should be injectable so offline and mocked tests can run without credentials.

modules.audio_processor.purpose: Record microphone input, buffer audio, and transcribe speech.
modules.audio_processor.notes: PyAudio requires PortAudio headers at install time.

modules.wake_word.purpose: Detect NOVA wake phrase before recording full commands.
modules.wake_word.notes: A fully offline fallback should be considered if Picovoice access is unavailable.

modules.voice_engine.notes: Support Piper as an offline provider to avoid hard dependency on external TTS.

modules.system_control.purpose: Control volume, brightness, applications, power, and desktop settings.
modules.system_control.notes: Commands must be allowlisted and validated before execution.

modules.file_manager.purpose: Open, search, copy, move, rename, and delete files through safe commands.
modules.file_manager.notes: Destructive operations should use trash or require explicit confirmation from higher-level policy.

modules.web_media.purpose: Weather, news, stocks, search, media lookup, and webpage retrieval.
modules.web_media.notes: Scraping must respect robots.txt, site terms, auth boundaries, and rate limits.

modules.browser_automation.purpose: Interact with websites for permitted automation tasks.
modules.browser_automation.notes: Use official APIs for Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube where available; do not bypass login, access controls, or platform protections.

modules.coding_assistant.purpose: Assist with code search, explanation, generation, and command execution.
modules.coding_assistant.notes: Shell execution must use policy checks and audit logs.

gui.main_window.purpose: PyQt6 desktop UI with chat, microphone controls, and status indicators.
gui.main_window.notes: Long-running voice and API work must run off the UI thread.

deployment.purpose: Installable Linux service and distributable package.
deployment.notes: Systemd user service is safer than root service for desktop assistant features.

quality.purpose: Formatting, linting, typing, tests, coverage, and security checks.
quality.notes: Ruff can cover many flake8 and pylint-style checks with faster feedback.
